rows.description: Computus Thomae Bray Rectoris a 2do Die
rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. The capitalization of 'Die' in gpt-5-mini's description matches the image more accurately than gemini-flash.
rows.section_header: Computus Thomae Bray Rectoris a 2do Die

rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. gemini-flash's 'revolutum' matches the image, whereas gpt-5-mini had 'revolutionis'.
Consensus on row type and empty amounts. gemini-flash's 'receptos' matches the image, whereas gpt-5-mini had 'recepta'.
Amounts are consensus. gemini-flash's description ('Gwyneer Rect: pro Dimid Anni') is more accurate visually than gpt-5-mini's ('Gwyner Rect: pro dimid Ann').
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of Gwyneer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of Gwyneer, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. gemini-flash's description ('Walnewington') matches the image, whereas gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Southnewington'.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of Walnewington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of Walnewington, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus on description, row type, and amounts from both extractors.
rows.english_description: Annual rent paid by (or from) Sadler at Garsington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent paid by Sadler at Garsington, amounting to £4 19s 3d.

rows.description: Tintinhul Napier pro An et Dimid
rows.notes: Description and amounts for pounds and pence are consistent. Shillings amount (19) chosen from gemini-flash based on visual verification, which clearly shows '19' rather than gpt-5-mini's '15'.
rows.english_description: Payment from Napier at Tintinhul covering a year and a half.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Napier at Tintinhul covering a year and a half, amounting to £6 19s 9d.

rows.notes: Amounts for shillings and pence are consistent. Pounds amount (5) and description ('Southnowington Scut.') chosen from gemini-flash based on visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds as '3' and description as 'Southnewington Tenant'.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipt from Southnowington labelled 'Scut.' (likely a local scutage/charge).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipt from Southnowington labelled 'Scut.', amounting to £5 10s 3d.

rows.description: Bensington pro Ann to Lady Day 1779
rows.notes: Amounts (3 pounds, 17 shillings, 4 pence and 0.25 fraction) are consensus. Description 'Bensington' chosen from gpt-5-mini as it matches the image, gemini-flash had 'Kensington'. Both extractors correctly interpreted the superscript '4' as a 0.25 pence fraction.
rows.english_description: Annual rent for Bensington due to Lady Day 1779.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for Bensington due to Lady Day 1779, amounting to £3 17s 4.25d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Description 'Quadren' chosen from gemini-flash based on visual verification, gpt-5-mini added an 's' making it 'Quadrens'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Quadrennial payment from Bampton, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.description: Radlane by { Mr Comyns Esq. 2 1/2 years to Lady Day 1779 ; Comyns & Donalshan pro Hanford Brian ; Greenhow pro An et Dimid to Day 1778 }
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identified this as a single entry with a braced, multi-line description and a single associated amount (23.6.8). gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into three separate entries with different amounts. The description has been refined by visual verification (e.g., 'Radlane' instead of 'Zadlane' and 'Donalshan' as a more plausible reading for 'Donathan').
rows.english_description: Grouped arrears/receipts: Radlane collected by Mr Comyns (two and a half years to Lady Day 1779); Comyns & Donalshan for Hanford Brian; and Greenhow for a year and a half to Lady Day 1778.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Grouped arrears/receipts (Radlane; Hanford; Greenhow and associated collectors), amounting in total to £23 6s 8d.

rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identified this as a distinct entry with the amount 2.0.0 directly below the braced group. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged parts of this description within the braced entry and missed this as a separate row.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Sergrove (nature of payment not specified).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Sergrove, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description is consistent between extractors. The shillings amount (18) is chosen from gpt-5-mini, which correctly identified '18s' (despite its note indicating initial confusion). gemini-flash misread this as '8s'. Visual verification clearly shows '18'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Giles Hall, amounting to £1 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Description refined by visual verification to 'Igaves Coll pro Ann'. gpt-5-mini's 'Ignus Coll' was a closer reading than gemini-flash's 'I give to Olle'.
rows.english_description: Annual receipt from 'Igaves Coll' (entry unclear as to whether this is a place or college).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual receipt from Igaves Coll, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly extracted this row with amount 0.10.0. gpt-5-mini completely missed this row and instead inserted an incorrect, non-existent row 'Will Cristl pro bien' at this position in its output.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial payment from Widow Arish, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds amount (9) chosen from gpt-5-mini based on visual verification, as the '9' is clearly in the pounds column; gemini-flash misread it as 9 shillings. Description 'Bach Gate' chosen from gemini-flash, as 'Bach' matches the image more accurately than 'Back'.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipt for the house at Bach Gate (a rented property).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipt for the house at Bach Gate, amounting to £9 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pence amount (4) chosen from gemini-flash based on visual verification, gpt-5-mini misread as '1'. Description refined to 'Isaac Leonard' based on visual confirmation of 'Isaac' over 'grace'.
rows.english_description: Small arrear payment relating to Currnock Busby; tenancy now with Isaac Leonard.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Small arrear payment relating to Currnock Busby (now Isaac Leonard), amounting to £0 0s 4d.

rows.notes: Total amount derived from gpt-5-mini, which correctly interpreted '03' pence and the '1/4' fraction as 3 pence and 0.25. gemini-flash incorrectly combined these into a 0.75 fraction. The description is intentionally left blank for total rows as per protocol.
